heading.purpose: Settings app title — only one per screen.

body.purpose: Labels, button text, select options, section titles.

label.purpose: Descriptions, hints, status lines, override notices.

shadows.name: capture-glow
shadows.purpose: Accent-colored ring on the shortcut-capture button while actively listening. State effect only — never on resting elements.

motion.name: capture-pulse
motion.purpose: Shortcut-capture button glow pulse. Alternates box-shadow on/off at 50% keyframe.

motion.name: waveform-pulse
motion.purpose: Pill preview waveform animation. Scales Y between 0.25x and 1x to create a live-audio feel.

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Standard button for all non-destructive actions. Raised surface background with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn { cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--cv-border, #2A2A2A); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--cv-surface-raised, #1A1A1A); color: var(--cv-text, #FAFAFA); padding: 8px 12px; font: inherit; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn:hover { border-color: var(--cv-text-muted, #8E8E8E); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--cv-accent, #10A37F); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive actions only — reset all settings. Border and text in Coral Alert, never filled red.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--cv-danger, #FF6B6B); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--cv-surface-raised, #1A1A1A); color: var(--cv-danger, #FF6B6B); padding: 8px 12px; font: inherit; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--cv-danger, #FF6B6B), transparent 85%); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--cv-danger, #FF6B6B); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Settings Card
components.description: Container for a settings section. Raised surface with hairline border, 12px radius, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid var(--cv-border, #2A2A2A); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--cv-surface-raised, #1A1A1A); padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--cv-text, #FAFAFA); } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; color: var(--cv-text-muted, #8E8E8E); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Text field for manual language code entry and language search. Surface background, one step below the card.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--cv-border, #2A2A2A); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; color: var(--cv-text, #FAFAFA); background: var(--cv-surface, #0F0F0F); font: inherit; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--cv-text-muted, #8E8E8E); opacity: 0.7; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--cv-accent, #10A37F); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--cv-accent, #10A37F); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Overlay Pill (Recording)
components.description: The signature component. Bottom-center floating pill during recording and transcription. Fixed black fill, restrained light keyline, a left-biased waveform or loading spinner, and an inset × cancel control that remains available throughout.
components.css: .ds-pill { position: relative; display: flex; min-width: 108px; min-height: 40px; align-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(250, 250, 250, 0.32); border-radius: 999px; padding: 6px 8px; background: #0F0F0F; color: #FAFAFA; font-family: Inter, 'Ubuntu Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-pill-waveform { position: absolute; left: 16px; color: #FAFAFA; font-size: 16px; animation: ds-wave 700ms ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .ds-pill-cancel { position: absolute; right: 8px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #FAFAFA; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; } @keyframes ds-wave { from { transform: scaleY(.25); } to { transform: scaleY(1); } }

components.name: Modal Dialog
components.description: Confirmation dialog for destructive actions. Fixed overlay with dimmed backdrop, centered settings card.
components.html:
Reset all settings?

This restores the shortcut, language, and enabled state.
components.css: .ds-modal { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: grid; place-items: center; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45); padding: 16px; } .ds-modal-card { border: 1px solid var(--cv-border, #2A2A2A); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--cv-surface-raised, #1A1A1A); padding: 16px; max-width: 24rem; } .ds-modal-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--cv-text, #FAFAFA); } .ds-modal-body { margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.45; color: var(--cv-text-muted, #8E8E8E); } .ds-modal-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; }

narrative.overview:
Codex Voice is a system utility, not an application. The design system reflects that: voice goes in, text comes out, and the chrome between is almost nothing. Every surface should feel like it was compiled alongside GNOME Shell — present, capable, never demanding attention. The accent color appears sparingly, like a status indicator on a well-made piece of hardware. The rest is neutral, precise, and quiet.

The palette follows OpenAI's brand language: near-black surfaces, off-white text, and a single signature teal-green accent — the same green on the ChatGPT send button. In a market full of neon-purple AI brands, this near-monochrome with one chromatic voice reads as the steady incumbent. The system is dark-first; light mode inverts the neutrals and keeps the same accent.

This system explicitly rejects bloated Electron settings panels with nested tabs, setup wizards, and unnecessary chrome. It rejects playful AI app aesthetics. It rejects legacy dense settings dialogs with no visual hierarchy.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, near-monochrome palette with a single teal-green accent
Flat surfaces; depth conveyed by tonal layering, not shadows
8px radius for controls, 12px for containers, full-pill for the overlay
Inter / Ubuntu Sans — one family, multiple weights, no display pairing
Settings apply instantly; every change shows visible feedback
The overlay pill is a fixed black-and-white signature component that must feel native to GNOME

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: ChatGPT Green appears on ≤10% of any given screen. It marks active settings controls — nothing else. If two green elements are visible simultaneously, one is redundant.

rules.name: The No-Tint Rule
rules.body: Neutrals are pure. No green tinting in the blacks, whites, or grays. The accent carries all the chroma; the neutrals carry none.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter everywhere. Ubuntu Sans is the system fallback on GNOME. Never introduce a second family for personality; the personality is in the restraint.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No uppercase tracked eyebrows above section headings. Section titles are sentence-case at body size.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No element casts a shadow at rest. Depth is tonal: surface, raised surface, and border. Shadows are reserved for state and are always accent-colored, never gray.

dos: Do use ChatGPT Green (#10A37F) only for active state and controls in the settings app. It appears on ≤10% of any screen.
Do convey depth with tonal layering (surface → raised surface) and hairline borders, never with shadows.
Do apply settings instantly with visible feedback — the fixed pill preview, the waveform, the checkbox state. No Save button.
Do use 8px radius for controls and 12px for containers. Full-pill (999px) is reserved for the overlay pill and pill-preview elements.
Do respect prefers-color-scheme — the system is dark-first but must invert cleanly. The accent stays #10A37F in both modes.
Do keep the settings app to one scrollable column at max-width: 768px, with exactly two top-level tabs and no sidebar.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. The current .override class violates this — rewrite it.
Don't use ChatGPT Green as a large fill, gradient, or background. It is an indicator color, not a surface color.
Don't pair border: 1px solid X with box-shadow: 0 Npx Mpx (M ≥ 16px) on the same element. Pick a border OR a shadow, never both.
Don't use border-radius greater than 12px on cards or inputs.
Don't add tabs beyond the top-level General and Transcriptions views, setup wizards, onboarding tours, or empty-state illustrations to the settings app.
Don't tint neutrals toward green or any other hue. The accent carries all chroma.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrows above section headings.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding). Use transform and opacity only.
